# KH Help Center

> Setup guides, troubleshooting, and support for Kyler Holland presets, transitions, LUTs, and digital assets.

- [KH Help Center](https://help.kylerholland.com/index.md): KH Help Center
- [Getting Started](https://help.kylerholland.com/getting-started/index.md): Download your Kyler Holland purchase, extract the files, and install presets, transitions, LUTs, and motion graphics in Premiere Pro or other apps.
- [Products](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/index.md): Browse help and support by product (42 total).
- [Subscriptions](https://help.kylerholland.com/subscriptions/index.md): Monthly and annual subscriptions for the Ultimate Effects Pack plugin — sign in, billing, cancellation, and access through your paid period.

## Getting Started

- [How KH Products Install](https://help.kylerholland.com/getting-started/how-products-install.md): Kyler Holland packs use different file types depending on the product. Use this guide to find the right install path — then open your product's help page for pack-specific details.

## Products

- [Zoom, Spin, and Slide Transitions](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/zoom-spin-and-slide-transitions/index.md): Zoom, spin, and slide motion presets for Adobe Premiere Pro — applied directly at the cut without building adjustment layers for each transition.
- [The Ultimate Effects Pack](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/the-ultimate-effects-pack/index.md): 700+ drag-and-drop transitions and effects for Premiere Pro — glitches, zooms, spins, camera moves, displacement, add-ons, and more. Many transitions include sound.
- [Subtitle Preset Pack](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/subtitle-preset-pack/index.md): Subtitle preset pack with 41+ effects and transitions for Premiere Pro. Elevate captions and lower-thirds with drag-and-drop style presets.
- [VHS Glitch Transitions](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/vhs-glitch-transitions/index.md): Drag-and-drop VHS-style glitch transitions for Adobe Premiere Pro — retro distortion, scan lines, and tape-era artifacts without building the effect from scratch.
- [Speed Zoom Transitions](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/speed-zoom-transitions/index.md): Drag-and-drop zoom presets for Adobe Premiere Pro. Add smooth, punchy zoom-in and zoom-out motion to any clip without manual keyframing.
- [Stutter Glitch](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/stutter-glitch/index.md): Free stutter-glitch transition presets for Adobe Premiere Pro. Import the pack, drop presets on adjustment layers at your cuts, or follow the tutorial's later chapters to rebuild the effect yourself.
- [Shake Transitions](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/shake-transitions-preset-pack/index.md): 90 drag-and-drop shake transitions for Premiere Pro. Add camera shake at cut points with Random, Horizontal, and Vertical styles at Light, Medium, and Heavy intensities.
- [Shape Offset Transition](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/shape-offset-transition/index.md): Shape-based offset transitions for Adobe Premiere Pro. The download includes shape layer assets plus a .prfpset you import like other KH transition packs.
- [Screen Recording Preset Pack](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/screen-recording-preset-pack/index.md): Zoom-into-region presets for screen recordings in Adobe Premiere Pro. Isolate part of the frame, blur the background, and tweak exposure — built for tutorials and UI walkthroughs.
- [Seamless Subtitles: 125+ Transitions](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/seamless-subtitles-v2/index.md): 125+ drag-and-drop text animation presets built for Premiere Pro captions and subtitle layers. Highlight your captions, apply a preset, and animate an entire section in seconds.
- [Seamless Flow Transition Pack](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/seamless-flow-transition-pack/index.md): A curated Premiere Pro project of Kyler Holland's favorite seamless transitions — import the whole pack into your timeline and drag pre-built transitions between clips.
- [Seamless Scale Preset Pack](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/seamless-scale-preset-pack/index.md): Scale in and out of any portion of the frame in Adobe Premiere Pro — seamless zoom presets without hand-keyframing every move.
- [Scale Width Up + Down](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/scale-width-up-down/index.md): Seamless text transition MOGRT for Premiere Pro. Switch between two text layers with smooth scale-width animations — ideal for kinetic typography, social content, and ads.
- [RGB Split Transitions](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/rgb-split-transitions/index.md): Modular RGB channel-split transitions for Adobe Premiere Pro. Control red, green, and blue channels independently on video and text — stack and keyframe for custom glitch/flicker looks.
- [Sam Kolder Lut Pack](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/sam-kolder-lut-pack/index.md): Sam Kolder–inspired .cube LUTs for any NLE, plus a Premiere Pro .prfpset for quick application. Each LUT is modular — tweak intensity in Lumetri after applying.
- [Outline vs Fill Motion Graphic](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/outline-vs-fill-motion-graphic/index.md): Outline vs Fill MOGRT for Premiere Pro — animate text between outline and filled states for dynamic title sequences.
- [Luma Fade Transitions](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/luma-fade-transitions/index.md): Modular luma fade transitions for Adobe Premiere Pro. Fade through blacks, whites, or both — applied directly on clips at the cut, with no adjustment layers required.
- [Lightroom Preset: BLACK 2.0](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/lightroom-preset-black-2-0/index.md): BLACK 2.0 is a Lightroom preset collection for high-contrast, dark cinematic stills. Install on iPhone, Android, or desktop Lightroom — each platform has its own tutorial.
- [Film Luts](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/film-luts/index.md): 26 handcrafted film LUTs for cinematic color grading — 13 Standard (Rec.709) and 13 matched Log versions. Includes .cube files and a Premiere Pro preset file.
- [Flicker Transitions](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/flicker-transitions/index.md): A modular flicker toolkit for Adobe Premiere Pro — house strobes, exposure hits, and transition flickers in one preset bin, with full keyframe control to build your own looks.
- [Fake Camera Movements](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/fake-camera-movements/index.md): Post-production camera movement presets for Adobe Premiere Pro — add rotation, scale, and slide motion to static shots without reshooting.
- [Exposure Transitions](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/exposure-transitions/index.md): Modular exposure-based transitions for Adobe Premiere Pro. Push brightness, invert color channels, and stack presets to build custom looks — all from drag-and-drop presets on an adjustment layer.
- [Dynamic Slide Text Motion Graphic](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/dynamic-slide-text-motion-graphic/index.md): A free Essential Graphics template for sliding text in Adobe Premiere Pro. Control intro duration, outro duration, and slide direction (per word or per line) without rebuilding expressions.
- [Dark Green Lut](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/dark-green-lut/index.md): A cinematic dark green grade for foliage and drone footage, plus a drag-and-drop LUT/preset for Adobe Premiere Pro. The tutorial walks through building the look with Hue/Saturation curves so you can fine-tune beyond the preset.
- [Digital Glitch Transitions](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/digital-glitch-transitions/index.md): 20 customizable digital glitch transitions for Adobe Premiere Pro (full pack). A free demo includes four presets so you can test the workflow before buying the full set.
- [Custom Shake Transition](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/custom-shake-transition/index.md): A high-energy shake transition preset for Adobe After Effects, plus the expression used to build it. Install the .ffx animation preset into After Effects — this is not a Premiere .prfpset pack.
- [Crop Slide Transitions](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/crop-slide-transitions/index.md): Easy crop + slide transition presets for Adobe Premiere Pro — drag onto cuts without hand-animating masks. The tutorial also shows how the effect is built if you want to customize it.
- [Custom Brush Motion Graphic](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/custom-brush-motion-graphic/index.md): Custom brush motion graphic MOGRT for Premiere Pro. Create and switch custom brush styles with adjustable color and settings.
- [Cinematic Black Bars](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/cinematic-black-bars/index.md): One-click cinematic letterbox presets for Adobe Premiere Pro. Add film-style black bars faster than exporting frames to Photoshop and reimporting PNG overlays.
- [Brevidy](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/brevidy/index.md): Brevidy has partnered with Kyler Holland to share their Premiere Pro extension for animated social captions, AutoCut (long-form → social clips), and Brevidy Media (stock footage, images, GIFs, emojis, and SFX inside Premiere).
- [Auto Resize Text Motion Graphic](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/auto-resize-text-motion-graphic/index.md): Free auto-resizing text MOGRT for Premiere Pro. Text automatically scales to fit your project width — no more manual resizing when copy length changes.
- [Auto Resize Lower Third](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/auto-resize-lower-third/index.md): A responsive lower-third motion graphic for Adobe Premiere Pro (from After Effects via MOGRT). Text and layout adjust as you edit copy in the Essential Graphics panel.
- [Audio Effects](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/audio-effects/index.md): Free Adobe Premiere Pro audio presets for faster sound editing — apply processing chains to clips in one drag instead of rebuilding effects each time.
- [48 Text Slide Transitions](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/48-text-slide-transitions/index.md): 48 sliding text animation presets for Adobe Premiere Pro lower thirds and titles. Scalable timing — works with short supers and longer name straps without retiming keyframes by hand.
- [200+ Text Effects](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/200-text-effects/index.md): Level up your text animations with a massive Premiere Pro text preset pack — 200+ drag-and-drop transitions and effects.
- [100 FREE Textures](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/100-free-textures/index.md): 100+ free animated texture MOGRTs for Premiere Pro. Custom images you can animate and customize — a flexible overlay toolkit for any edit.
- [14 FREE 4K Light Leaks](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/14-free-4k-light-leaks/index.md): 14 free 4K light leak clips for overlays and transitions in Adobe Premiere Pro (and other editors). The tutorial also shows how to shoot your own leaks with a zoom lens and black background.
- [10 Texture Overlays](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/10-texture-overlays/index.md): Ten customizable texture overlay templates for Adobe Premiere Pro (Essential Graphics). Use them as transitions or stack them over footage — with control over whites and blacks for the final look.
- [10 FREE Luts](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/10-free-luts/index.md): Ten free .cube LUTs for video. Download includes cubes for Premiere and a separate link for non-Premiere editors (DaVinci, FCP, etc.) mentioned in the tutorial.
- [10 Glitch Overlays](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/10-glitch-overlays/index.md): Ten free glitch overlay templates for animating text, logos, and transitional elements in Adobe Premiere Pro (via Essential Graphics / MOGRT workflow from the After Effects source).
- [10 Cinematic Luts](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/10-cinematic-luts/index.md): Ten cinematic .cube LUTs created in Lightroom for still-inspired color, packaged for video. Includes a Premiere .prfpset for one-drag grading plus standalone cubes for any editor.
- [1,300 Cinematic Sound Effects](https://help.kylerholland.com/products/1300-cinematic-sound-effects/index.md): 1,300+ cinematic sound effects for video projects — organized for quick browsing and drag-in editing in Premiere Pro or any DAW.

## Subscriptions

- [Sign-in & devices](https://help.kylerholland.com/subscriptions/sign-in-and-devices.md): The Ultimate Effects Pack plugin unlocks with your Sellfy purchase email — not a license key. This page covers sign-in, device limits, and fixes for common access issues.
- [Cancel your subscription](https://help.kylerholland.com/subscriptions/cancel-your-subscription.md): You can cancel your Ultimate Effects Pack monthly or annual subscription at any time. Future charges stop, but you keep plugin access until the end of your current billing period — the time you've already paid for.

## Support

- [Downloads & Updates](https://help.kylerholland.com/support/downloads-and-updates.md): How to download your Kyler Holland products after checkout, re-download them anytime from your account, and get updated pack files when new versions are available.
- [Tutorial Index](https://help.kylerholland.com/support/tutorial-index.md): Video walkthroughs for Kyler Holland products. Each link goes to YouTube — open your product's help page for written install steps, FAQs, and troubleshooting.
- [Affiliate Program](https://help.kylerholland.com/support/affiliate-program.md): Earn commission when someone buys a Kyler Holland product through your affiliate link.
- [Troubleshooting & FAQ](https://help.kylerholland.com/support/troubleshooting.md): Common questions and fixes for Kyler Holland digital products. Start here if something isn't working — most issues are download, install, or Premiere setup related.
- [Report a Bug](https://help.kylerholland.com/support/report-a-bug.md): Something installed correctly but still isn't working the way it should? Tell us what broke so we can look into it.
- [Refunds & Purchase Policy](https://help.kylerholland.com/support/refunds-and-policy.md): Thank you for your interest in Kyler Holland digital products. Please read this policy before purchasing so you understand how digital orders work.
- [Contact Support](https://help.kylerholland.com/support/contact.md): Can't find what you need in the docs?
